history.text: Portuguese Mozambique appears in Mozambique's historical record.
The Mozambican War of Independence became the central struggle for Mozambique's independence and future statehood.
Mozambique was granted independence, completing the formal transition to sovereign statehood.
People's Republic of Mozambique introduced a new form of state rule.
Civil War marked a violent internal conflict that shaped Mozambique's modern politics.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Mozambique.
